pages.text: Welcome to Tier 8, the tier that - finally - unlocks Applied Energistics 2. Though, don't rush to remove all of your setups now - they're still useful. Also, don't forget to scale them to support the Certus Quartz costs of various machines.
The main source of Certus Quartz in the pack. Install Secondary Sieves and process through a Resonator to get gems.
Perhaps you're used to AE2 doing everything for you in other packs. Maybe even solve the whole pack through on-demand crafting. Well, not anymore.

In this pack, AE2 networks are hard capped on how much power they can take. The default restriction is 100 RF/t, so if your network uses more (which is easy with even small crafting processors), it will constantly black out. However, this can be upgraded using an Electro-Matter Modulator. This machine requires Factory parts to run. The better the parts, the higher the power cap, but there's still a ceiling that is pretty hard to beat.
